items.title: [issue-open]: 🚀 Join the World Computer Hacker League!
items.author: espieux
items.content:
Hi exaroth 👋

We noticed your repository includes a `dfx.json` file, which means you're building on the Internet Computer Protocol (ICP) 🚀

That's awesome! Since you're already familiar with the ICP ecosystem, we wanted to personally invite you to the **World Computer Hackathon League (WCHL)**, a global competition for top Web3 and AI builders like you, with **over $300,000 in prizes** up for grabs.

👉 https://pthub.short.gy/wchlg

If you decide to join, make sure to select the **Portugal HUB 🇵🇹** when entering the Discord.

We're one of the most active and supportive hubs in the ecosystem. You will have access to bookable 1-to-1 meetings with experienced mentors to help shape and refine your project.

Let's join forces to build something impactful together 💪
